probes.name: transaction-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms every migration this module ships has run: transactions + transaction_ledger_entries + their indexes (composite unique index on (tenant_id, transaction_number, YEAR(effective_date)) + running-balance indexes on ledger entries). Missing schema is a fail-hard startup error.

probes.name: transaction-number-generator-lock
probes.description: Verifies the Postgres advisory-lock function used by TransactionNumberGenerator resolves + acquires-releases in < 100ms on a smoke-test payload. Missing advisory-lock support = the module cannot guarantee unique transaction_number generation under concurrent writes.

probes.name: transaction-observer-registered
probes.description: Confirms TransactionObserver + TransactionLedgerEntryObserver are registered against their models. Missing observer = the load-bearing invariants (ledger balance, immutability) are un-enforced.

probes.name: transaction-chart-of-accounts-loaded
probes.description: Confirms data/chart-of-accounts-catalog.json is present + parses to exactly 14 accounts + every entry has description + regulator_category. Missing chart = every ledger-entry-observer.creating fails with LEDGER_ENTRY_INVALID_ACCOUNT.

probes.name: transaction-kind-catalog-loaded
probes.description: Confirms data/kind-catalog.json is present + parses to exactly 12 kinds + every entry has description + expected_ledger_entries (canonical debit/credit pair for validation).

probes.name: transaction-halt-flag-consistency
probes.description: Reads the count of tenants with tenant.transaction_halt_new=true. > 0 indicates active ledger-imbalance investigations blocking new transactions. Non-blocking on startup but WARNS on readiness. Ops must resolve within SLA (defined per-tenant).

probes.name: transaction-reconciler-recent
probes.description: Confirms ReconcileLedgerBalancesJob completed within the last 26 hours (nightly cadence + 2h slop for long-running jobs). Stale reconciler = we can't guarantee the ledger has been balance-checked recently — regulator-facing SLA breach.

probes.name: transaction-unresolved-imbalances
probes.description: Counts LedgerImbalanceDetected fires in the last 30 days that have no follow-up resolution transaction. > 0 = a P0 imbalance is unresolved + accumulating investigator attention. Regulator-facing.

probes.name: transaction-exchange-rate-provider-healthy
probes.description: Confirms the configured exchange-rate provider (openexchangerates / fixer_io / ecb_daily) is reachable + returning fresh rates within max_stale_seconds. Non-critical because same-currency transactions work regardless — but cross-currency tenants are blocked when the provider is down.

probes.name: transaction-account-balances-computed
probes.description: Confirms per-account running balances are computed + cached for every active tenant. Feeds the SDUI ledger-account list. Stale balances = the ledger view is out of date but not broken.

probes.name: transaction-compliance-archive-writable
probes.description: Confirms the compliance-storage archive backend (S3 with Object Lock) is reachable + writable. Critical because PurgeExpiredTransactionDataJob refuses to hard-purge without a successful archive write; a broken archive backend = purges silently blocked + retention window overrun.

probes.name: transaction-monthly-report-recent
probes.description: Confirms the monthly GenerateGeneralLedgerReportJob ran within the last 35 days for tenants with transaction_advanced_reporting entitlement. Stale monthly report = tenant will notice; not P0 but a support ticket.
